nasb.text: and Serug lived two hundred years after he became the father of Nahor, and he had other sons and daughters.

esv.text: And Serug lived after he fathered Nahor 200 years and had other sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 西鹿生拿鶴以後，又活了二百年，並且生了其他的兒女。

ccb.text: 之后又活了二百年，生儿育女。

csbs.text: 西鹿生了拿鹤之后，又活了两百年，并且生了其他的儿女。
